privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic WordPress user with specific parameters explicitly stated in the task description and verification scripts: username 'marketing_lead', email 'marketing@example.com', first name 'Sarah', last name 'Johnson', and role 'editor'. These exact parameters are used in programmatic and visual verification to confirm task success.
